channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: 5 important Gemini updates from Google I/O that could genuinely save you time
item.description: From AI shopping carts to smarter Search and Gmail, Gemini is now deeply integrated across Google.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:text: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026
media:content.media:title: Sundar Pichai on stage at Google I/O 2026

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide vs. Motorola Razr Fold: Will it be worth the compromise?
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide is expected to be a Pixel Fold-style foldable with an almost square aspect ratio. But the Motorola Razr Fold will be a formidable rival around the same price.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: Motorola Razr 2026 vs. Razr 2025: A few steps forward, one big step back
item.description: Motorola's budget Razr isn't as budget, but the 2026 model is a still a valuable addition to the lineup better than its predecessor in every way but one.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr 2026 balancing on a stand

item.title: Did Google use a MacBook during its live demo at Google I/O?
item.description: Google used a MacBook during the Antigravity demo and it's super funny.
item.author: shruti.shekar@futurenet.com (Shruti Shekar)
item.dc:creator: Shruti Shekar

media:content.media:description: google using a mac during google io
media:content.media:text: google using a mac during google io
media:content.media:title: google using a mac during google io

item.title: Google’s new $100 AI plan wants to turn Gemini into a full productivity machine
item.description: Google is turning Gemini into a premium AI ecosystem with pricier power-user tiers, smarter tools, and usage limits that now feel a lot like AI surge pricing.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Gemini app usage history
media:content.media:text: Gemini app usage history
media:content.media:title: Gemini app usage history

item.title: This Google AI tool can now build Android apps from text prompts
item.description: Google AI Studio can now generate native Android apps from prompts, complete with emulator testing and Play Console integration.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 models with different color home screens

item.title: Google Play is getting a huge AI upgrade with Ask Play and Play Shorts
item.description: Google announced a wave of Google Play updates, including Ask Play AI search, Play Shorts, and Gemini app discovery.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC
media:content.media:text: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC
media:content.media:title: The Google Play Logo on stage at an event in NYC

item.title: Forget CamelCamelCamel: Google's new Universal Cart will track prices and find deals for you
item.description: Google's new Universal Cart tracks prices, stock changes, and deals across multiple retailers automatically.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google
media:content.media:text: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google
media:content.media:title: The new Universal Cart shopping feature of Google

item.title: Google's new YouTube AI tools could make AI slop impossible to escape
item.description: Google announced Ask YouTube conversational search and Gemini Omni-powered Shorts remixing tools at I/O 2026.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube app on Samsung TV
media:content.media:text: YouTube app on Samsung TV
media:content.media:title: YouTube app on Samsung TV

item.title: Google I/O gets into a Flow: preps Flow Music app and generative editing for on-the-go
item.description: Google's AI cascades into Flow and Flow Music, as it announced extreme Omni Flash AI upgrades and apps for mobile.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.
media:content.media:text: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.
media:content.media:title: Google I/O 2026 announces a Flow Music app, letting users engage with AI altered or generated tunes with tools to edit those tracks.

item.title: Dreaming of Project Genie? Google I/O unveils 'Street View,' putting imaginary worlds into ours
item.description: Google's Project Genie slips into the real-world, thanks to Street View and your imagined prompts for re-created AI places.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Deepmind
media:content.media:text: Google Deepmind
media:content.media:title: Google Deepmind

item.title: Tired of video editing? Google’s Gemini Omni changes scenes when you ask
item.description: Google’s Gemini Omni turns AI video creation into a conversation, but while the tools look powerful, spotting what’s real online may soon get a lot harder.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Gemini brings "custom Gems" to Gemini Advanced, Business, and Enterprise users.
media:content.media:text: Google Gemini brings "custom Gems" to Gemini Advanced, Business, and Enterprise users.
media:content.media:title: Google Gemini brings "custom Gems" to Gemini Advanced, Business, and Enterprise users.

item.title: Google Workspace just went 'Live' with Docs and Gmail, using your voice for less stress
item.description: Google I/O 2026 announced a massive selection of Workspace updates that make managing your days easy, stress-free, and oh, so simple.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.
media:content.media:text: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.
media:content.media:title: Google debuts Docs Live, amongst Gmail Live and voice capabilities in Keep, giving users a way to ask the AI questions or to ramble on their ideas and have them converted into organized notes.

item.title: Samsung, Google merge fashion and AI for 'Intelligent Eyewear' with Gentle Monster, Warby Parker
item.description: Samsung and Google partner to announce "Intelligent Eyewear," a new venture for glasses that brings style to AI technology.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.
media:content.media:text: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.
media:content.media:title: Samsung partners with Google to create "Intelligent eyewear," an AI companion in the form of glasses for your phone, alongside Gentle Monster.

item.title: Google is giving Search its biggest overhaul in 25 years
item.description: Google just turned Search into an AI-powered assistant that chats, books, tracks, and monitors the web for you.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Search on HP Chromebase
media:content.media:text: Google Search on HP Chromebase
media:content.media:title: Google Search on HP Chromebase

item.title: Planning a wedding? Google's new Gemini Spark AI agents might actually help
item.description: Google announced Gemini Spark, a new proactive AI agent powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash that can automate tasks across apps and services.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Gemini Spark unveiled at Google I/O
media:content.media:text: Gemini Spark unveiled at Google I/O
media:content.media:title: Gemini Spark unveiled at Google I/O

item.title: Google's new Gemini features will take all the annoying busywork off your plate
item.description: Google adds Daily Brief, desktop app upgrades to Gemini, and gives us a preview of Android Halo.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:text: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:title: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus

item.title: Google thinks Gemini 3.5 Flash can finally make AI agents more useful
item.description: Google’s Gemini 3.5 Flash is built to handle complex AI tasks faster, pushing Gemini beyond chatbots and deeper into full-blown AI agent territory.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Using the new Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro models in the Gemini app.
media:content.media:text: Using the new Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro models in the Gemini app.
media:content.media:title: Using the new Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro models in the Gemini app.

item.title: This cheap Chromebook just got even cheaper with $220 OFF for Best Buy's Memorial Day sale
item.description: This 14-inch HP Chromebook is just $180 during the sales event.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: A person smiling with an HP laptop on their lap
media:content.media:text: A person smiling with an HP laptop on their lap
media:content.media:title: A person smiling with an HP laptop on their lap

item.title: Oura, Resmed partnership helps point out sleep health issues you didn't know you had
item.description: Oura announced a Resmed partnership, seeking to help users identify potential signs of OSA throughout the night.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic

item.title: RedMagic's 11S Pro is a gaming beast, and it's crazy to think Liquid Cooling is in this phone
item.description: RedMagic 11S Pro series gets launched in China, and it's an incredible gaming beast with Liquid Cooling that seems poised for a global debut.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The RedMagic 11S Pro in white.
media:content.media:text: The RedMagic 11S Pro in white.
media:content.media:title: The RedMagic 11S Pro in white.

item.title: Google could fix the absolute worst thing about passkeys on Android
item.description: Google may finally let Android users move passkeys between password managers, fixing one of the biggest headaches with the passwordless future.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google password manager logo
media:content.media:text: Google password manager logo

item.title: Apple reveals WWDC 26 in the shadow of Google I/O
item.description: Apple sits in Google's I/O 2026 shadow, announces WWDC 2026 dates, and what we can expect to see.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Apple announced WWDC 2026 for June 8-12.

item.title: Here's your first look at more of Google's new 3D emojis for Android 17

item.title: Google's new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive and more are finally rolling out

item.title: The Galaxy S26 is selling better than the S25, but Samsung may be pushing its luck
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 had a killer launch thanks to early Ultra hype, but a $100 price hike might just have tanked its momentum.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Pixel Watch owners say sleep tracking is broken again (Updated)
item.description: Pixel Watch users are dealing with another Fitbit bug, as sleep stats vanish from the watch itself even though the data still shows up in the Fitbit app.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Morning Brief Sleep Tracking on Pixel Watch 3
media:content.media:text: Morning Brief Sleep Tracking on Pixel Watch 3
media:content.media:title: Morning Brief Sleep Tracking on Pixel Watch 3

item.title: Your OnePlus update is on hold, and honestly, you should be glad
item.description: OnePlus has pulled its latest OxygenOS update after boot loop issues hit some phones.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: This thin magnetic plate from Rolling Square is nearly invisible and can mount phones and tablets to screens
item.description: The Rolling Square Edge Pro Core is a one-of-a-kind magnetic metal mount that's unbelievably thin, yet insanely hardy. It can prop up tablets and phones alike.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount
media:content.media:text: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount
media:content.media:title: Rolling Square Edge Pro Core magnetic mount

item.title: The Motorola Razr Fold's displays are better than Google's or Samsung's, and these unique settings are its ace in the hole
item.description: Motorola switched from pOLED to Extreme AMOLED panels on the Razr Fold, but the company isn't letting its great eye care solutions fall to the wayside.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:text: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:title: The lockscreen on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026

item.title: Unlock the Razr Fold 2026's true multitasking power with these hidden features
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is a brilliant phone with plenty of power to spare, but a few quick settings changes will unlock its true power.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Using multiple apps at a time on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026
media:content.media:text: Using multiple apps at a time on a Motorola Razr Fold 2026

item.title: Google I/O 2026 Live Blog updates: Android 17, Android XR glasses, Gemini AI news
item.description: Google I/O is happening on May 19 and Android Central is following everything that is going to be announced. Follow our Live Blog to learn about all the news!

item.title: 6 reasons to buy the Motorola Razr Fold and 3 reasons to skip it

item.title: The Motorola Razr Fold cameras are so powerful, you could use it to spot Jack and Rose on the Titanic from New York
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold 2026 does what no other Motorola phone before it could, and that all starts with a class-leading camera.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Now Brief on Galaxy might make sure your priorities never go unread in One UI 9
item.description: One UI 9 is allegedly working on an important update for Galaxy's Now Brief, potentially making it highlight "priority" alerts you've missed.

item.title: Meta's Ray-Ban Display build for the future, opens its doors to developers

item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is the company's first book-style foldable and it boasts of impressive specs and is pledged to get seven years of OS upgrades.

item.title: Does the Motorola Razr 2026 support Qi2 wireless charging?
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 series of devices have substantial powerpacks with fast wired and wireless charging. However, native Qi2 support isn't there.
item.author: sharmarajat@zoho.com (Rajat Sharma)
item.dc:creator: Rajat Sharma

item.title: A 'Home Display' appeared in Google's code, and the timing could be significant
item.description: We're really looking forward to I/O now, after a rumor allegedly spotted a "Google Home Display" in the company's code.
